ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk measurement and quantification methods, including risk metrics design, proxy indicators for unmeasurable or emerging risks, fairness measurement across protected attributes, and the translation of risk measurement results into governance decisions.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-014 (AG, Knowledge) maps to Health Informatics Specialist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5311 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.531, eu_ai_act=0.523, nice=0.410. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5311 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-K-014 (AG, composite 0.5311) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.5311 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.531, eu_ai_act=0.523, nice=0.410 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5311, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
